event_clock.decision_bar: completed UTC-aligned 15m bar with exactly three continuous 5m trade bars
event_clock.metric_row: latest positioning snapshot whose create_time + 5 minutes is <= decision_time and whose age is <= 6 minutes
event_clock.level_freshness: only the first completed crossing/raid of each level family, day, and side is eligible; that level-side is consumed for the UTC day after the first event
event_clock.PDH_PDL: previous UTC day must contain all 96 complete 15m bars
event_clock.ASIA_HIGH_LOW: current UTC day 00:00-08:00 session must contain all 32 complete 15m bars and is usable only from 08:00 onward
event_clock.price_or_metric_gap: starts a new continuity segment; 30-day normalizers require at least seven continuous days after the gap

simulation_clock.stop_or_target_touch: slot stays occupied until the touching 5m bar closes
simulation_clock.future_gap: invalidate only if the actual entry-to-exit path crosses it, not merely because a later unused horizon contains a gap
